AroundCities 

* Table: events (major intentional content table)
    * Event id: auto generated 
	* Status: active/inactive/obsoleted
    * Title 
    * Description 
    * location 
    * Start date (date only)
    * End date (date only)
    * Organiser 
    * Source link : url
	* Source remarks: free text
* Table: event_registrations
    * Event registration id: auto generated 
    * Event id: reference to events table 
	* Status: active/inactive/obsoleted
    * Start date (date only) 
    * End end (date only) 
	* Registration URL: link to the official website (if any)
* Table: event_schedules 
    * Event schedule id: auto generated 
    * Event id: reference to events table 
	* Status: active/inactive/obsoleted
	* Event Date: the actual day of the event (means one event could have multipl records here)
    * Start time (time only) 
    * End time (time only) 
* Table: event_programs 
    * Event program id: auto generated 
    * Event schedule id: reference to event schedules table 
	* Status: active/inactive/obsoleted
	* Title ( Singing competition at KCH food fest, happens only at 10 June. starting from 7pm until 10pm, where KCH food fest starts from 5PM until 11PM )
	* Description 
    * Start time (time only) 
    * End time (time only) 
    * Organiser 
	* Photo url: if there are any poster related only to that single program, can use it here
    * Source link : some events are promoted seperately for each program, can put it here.
    * Source type: fb/newspaper
* Table: photos 
    * Photo id: auto generated 
	* Event id: reference to events table (optional) 
	* Status: active/inactive/obsoleted
	* Photo Type: photo/event/screenshot 
    * Photo URL 
    * Title
    * Description: optional 
    * Location 
    * Captured date
    * Captured by
* Table: holidays (if a holiday contains more than one day, like CNY, then it will have multiple records in this table)
    * Holiday Id:auto generated
	* Type: school/public/ 
	* Status: active/inactive/obsoleted
	* Date: (date only) 
	* Name: Name of the holiday
	* Description: explaination
	* Greeting Message 1 : Gayu Guru Gerai Nyamai
	* Greeting Message 2 : Selamat Hari Gawai! Gayu Guru Gerai Nyamai
	* Greeting Message 3 : Happy Gawai Dayak!
* Table: positive_messages
    * Greeting Id:auto generated 
	* Status: active/inactive/obsoleted
    * Description 
* Table: translates
	* Reference type: event, photo, event_schedule, event_program etc
    * Reference id: reference to event id, photo id, event_schedule_id, event_program_id etc
    * Language: ch/bm
    * Field name
    * Translated text
* Table: content state
	* Reference type: event, photo, event_schedule, event_program etc
    * Reference id: reference to event id, photo id, event_schedule_id, event_program_id etc
    * stat_date
    * stat_hour
    * view_count
    * click_count

Note: All table should auto includes created date, created by, updated date, updated by
